title: Rex | The AI operations partner for order-to-cash
excerpt: Rex builds the AI order-to-cash workforce for global enterprises, with agents that cover every account and resolve exceptions before cash gets stuck.
content_html:
Rex maps your order to cash process, highlights where cash gets stuck, then recovers it with AI agents. Get a review in days, see ROI in weeks.

AI that does the work. ROI you can measure.

Synthesia runs AR operationswith Rex.

The AR inbox, 30+ customer portals, and collections, handled by Rex with no added headcount.

Read the customer story

Problem

Order to cash still runs on manual work.Execution is slow, context is fragmented, and cash gets held up in exceptions.

Inboxes

Legacy systems

Offshore teams

Excel sheets

Solution

Rex runs your order to cash process continuously.Agents work every invoice, account, and customer touchpoint so cash keeps moving.

Cover every account

Review every open PO on Ariba …

Run order to cash at any scale, with the team you already have. Delegate inbox triage, supplier portals, and cash application.

See everything

Real-time visibility across your AR book. Stop tracking notes in spreadsheets. Get a live view of every customer and receivable.

Stay ahead

Case · Boeing

Active case

  1. Detected payment cadence drift +7d

  2. 3 open invoices. No activity since Mar 28

  3. Risk score: 82% slip past 60-day terms

  4. Rex is monitoring

Get ahead of every receivable. Rex proactively follows up, flags risk and resolves issues before they escalate.

Comparison

The new way to run order to cashvs outsourcing and consulting.

Pricing

Traditional

Priced by headcount and scope.

Consulting

Time and materials, scoped by the study.

Rex

Outcome and SLA-based pricing.

Coverage

Traditional

Depends on staffing, shifts, and handoffs.

Consulting

Ends when the engagement ends.

Rex

Continuous coverage with minute-level triage.

Visibility

Traditional

Monthly reports, reviews, and status calls.

Consulting

A snapshot of last quarter, in a deck.

Rex

Live view of actions, blockers, and SLA status.

Onboarding

Traditional

Multi-month transition, documentation, and ramp-up.

Consulting

Months of interviews and workshops.

Rex

Start in days. See value in weeks.

Control

Traditional

Process docs and offshore management.

Consulting

Recommendations. Execution stays with you.

Rex

Implement process changes by next day.

Quality

Traditional

Highly variable.

Consulting

Depends who is staffed.

Rex

Consistent and auditable.

Integrations

No onboarding or
knowledge transfer required.Rex reads everything.

Rex connects to your existing systems and builds context from years of history. Your team doesn't need to explain anything.

Rex

End to end process coverage, without the headcount.

90%+
Inbox auto-triage rate

30m
Average response time

12d
Faster DSO

Security

Built for enterprise.

Compliance

SOC2 Type II(monitoring)

SOC 2 Type II (monitoring), AES-256 encryption, role-based access, and full audit logs on every action.

Data privacy

GDPR

GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Encrypted in transit and at rest. Your data is never used to train models.

Enterprise-grade

Enterprise SSODirectory SyncRole-based accessAgent audit logsNo model training

Enterprise SSO with Okta, Azure AD, Auth0, and dozens more, plus SCIM directory sync and magic links.

content_html_zh:
Rex 将您的订单映射到现金流程，突出显示现金被卡住的地方，然后通过人工智能代理将其恢复。 几天内即可获得审核，几周内即可看到投资回报率。

人工智能来完成这项工作。 您可以衡量的投资回报率。

Synthesia 与 Rex 一起运行 AR 操作。

AR 收件箱、30 多个客户门户和集合由 Rex 处理，无需增加人员。

阅读客户故事

问题

从订单到现金仍然依靠手工操作。执行速度慢，上下文分散，并且现金在异常情况下受到阻碍。

收件箱

遗留系统

离岸团队

Excel 工作表

解决方案

Rex 持续运行您的订单到现金流程。代理负责处理每张发票、账户和客户接触点，确保现金持续流动。

覆盖每个账户

审核 Ariba 上的每个未结订单……

与您已有的团队一起运行任何规模的订单到现金。 委托收件箱分类、供应商门户和现金申请。

查看一切

AR 图书的实时可见性。 停止跟踪电子表格中的注释。 实时查看每个客户和应收账款。

保持领先

案例·波音

活跃案例

  1. 检测到支付节奏漂移 +7 天
  2. 3.开具发票。 自3月28日起没有任何活动
  3. 风险评分：82% 超过 60 天期限
  4. 雷克斯正在监视

提前处理好每一笔应收账款。 Rex 主动跟进、标记风险并在问题升级之前解决问题。

比较

从订单到现金的新方式与外包和咨询相比。

定价

传统的

按人数和范围定价。

咨询

时间和材料，由研究范围确定。

Rex

结果和基于 SLA 的定价。

覆盖范围

传统的

取决于人员配置、轮班和交接。

咨询

当订婚结束时结束。

Rex

通过分钟级分类进行持续覆盖。

能见度

传统的

每月报告、评论和状态电话。

咨询

上季度的快照，在甲板上。

Rex

操作、阻止程序和 SLA 状态的实时视图。

入职

传统的

数月的过渡、文档和启动。

咨询

数月的采访和研讨会。

Rex

几天后开始。 查看以周为单位的值。

控制

传统的

流程文档和离岸管理。

咨询

建议。 执行力与您同在。

Rex

在第二天之前实施流程变更。

质量

传统的

高度可变。

咨询

取决于谁配备。

Rex

一致且可审核。

集成

无需入职或知识转移。Rex 阅读所有内容。

Rex 连接到您现有的系统并根据多年的历史构建背景。 您的团队不需要解释任何事情。

Rex

端到端流程覆盖，无需人员统计。

90%+收件箱自动分类率

30mA平均响应时间

12dFaster DSO

安全

专为企业打造。

遵守

SOC2 Type II（监控）

SOC 2 Type II（监控）、AES-256 加密、基于角色的访问以及每个操作的完整审核日志。

数据隐私

GDPR

符合欧盟数据驻留的 GDPR。 在传输和静态时加密。 您的数据永远不会用于训练模型。

企业级

企业SSO目录同步基于角色的访问代理审核日志无模型培训

使用 Okta、Azure AD、Auth0 等的企业 SSO，以及 SCIM 目录同步和魔术链接。
